Description: Tao family parametric phuc tap — combine bridge tools cho setup + script cho complex geometry.

Use_When: family can geometry phuc tap khong the tao bang bridge extrusion/sweep/blend/revolution
geometry can adaptive points, complex lofted forms, surface manipulation
task yeu cau parametric logic phuc tap vuot kha nang formula don gian
Dont_Use_When: geometry don gian (box, cylinder, L-shape) — dung family_create_simple
family la MEP voi round/rect geometry — dung family_create_mep
task chi can add parameters hoac types — dung individual bridge tools
DecisionGate.Prefer_Over: script.run_safe alone — vi bridge tools van dung cho parameter/type setup (an toan hon), chi dung script cho geometry.

Steps.Purpose: Verify template category va existing state.
Add parameters qua bridge (an toan, co dry-run).
Setup reference planes cho script geometry alignment.
Tim script phu hop trong catalog cho geometry creation task.
Steps.Verify: Catalog co script matching geometry type can tao.

Steps.Purpose: Validate script truoc khi chay — kiem tra blocked APIs va mutation scope.
Chay script de tao complex geometry. Script co transaction wrap + rollback.
Steps.Verify: script.get_run shows Success, family.list_geometry shows new forms.

Steps.Purpose: Verify geometry da duoc tao dung.
Steps.Verify: Forms count va types match expected.

Steps.Purpose: Set formulas cho parameters da add o buoc 2.

QcStep.ExpectedOutcome: Co geometry forms, parameters, types, formulas. Geometry khop voi script output.
